facebook.caption: If snorkeling is on your Phu Quoc bucket list, Into The Blue is the name you need to know. Sitting on the main strip of Tran Hung Dao Street, this boat trip operator has earned a perfect 5-star rating across over 540 reviews, which really does say everything. Guests consistently rave about the experience, so whether you're a first-time snorkeler or a seasoned underwater explorer, this is a solid pick. Practical tip: book ahead, especially during peak season from November to April when spots fill up fast.

instagram.caption: Crystal water, colorful reefs, and a 5-star reputation built on 540+ happy snorkelers. Into The Blue on Tran Hung Dao Street is one of those rare finds that actually lives up to the hype. Book ahead during dry season and get ready to see Phu Quoc from below the surface.

tiktok.caption: 540+ reviews. Perfect 5 stars. Into The Blue in Phu Quoc is not a drill. #PhuQuoc #SnorkelingVibes #VietnamTravel #IslandActivities
